pricing_analysis.notes: Card exhibits moderate play wear, including significant edge/corner whitening and surface scratches. Priced competitively for its condition.

seo_title: Pokemon Raichu Holo 14/102 Base Set WOTC Vintage Moderately Played MP TCG
condition_summary: This Raichu holographic card from the Base Set (14/102) is in Moderately Played (MP) condition. The front exhibits light surface scratches on the holographic foil and noticeable whitening along all edges and corners. The back shows more significant whitening and fraying on all edges and corners, along with several light surface scratches. No major creases, bends, or tears are present.
description_body: Up for sale is a vintage Pokémon TCG Raichu holographic card, number 14/102 from the iconic Base Set. This card is a must-have for collectors looking to complete their original sets or for fans of classic Pokémon. While showing signs of its age and play, it remains a fantastic piece of Pokémon history. Please review all photos carefully to assess the card's condition. It will be shipped securely to ensure it arrives safely.
shipping_recommendation: USPS First Class Package (with tracking and bubble mailer) due to value.
photo_defect_log: Front surface: Light scratches/scuffs on holographic foil.
Front edges: Noticeable whitening along all edges.
Front corners: Moderate whitening and minor fraying on all corners.
Back surface: Several light scratches/scuffs and minor dirt.
Back edges: Significant whitening along all edges, especially top and left.
Back corners: Significant whitening and fraying on all corners.
